name: Dream District - Lust Conflict RPG
description:
You awaken in a hazy, pink-tinted realm. The air itself seems to shimmer with lustful energy. As you take in your surroundings, a sultry voice echoes:

"Welcome to the Dream District, mortal. You've been chosen for our entertainment. Survive our trials of temptation, complete your objectives, and perhaps you'll earn your freedom... though most find they don't want to leave~"

You're left standing in the Dreamy Plaza, the central hub connecting all districts. Your objective: Collect 3 Dream Fragments from the surrounding districts and unlock the gates of the Crimson Cathedral...

...

Important Note: This is an experimental bot with Janitor's Lorebook System. Now that the AI can trigger entries, I built this around that. This has a potential of around 6k tokens, but I worked really hard at optimizing it to work well with keyword triggers and such. I recommend THE PROXY OF YOUR CHOICE THAT HANDLES STATS WELL. I have not tested on JLLM, but... I dare say, this may actually work on it due to the token optimizations with Lorebooks (for up to the 9k context they allow at least or with solid user edited memory management).
Again, this is experimental, and has mostly been tested on my own platform(s), and less on Janitor.

Key Features: Four unique areas with different types of characters/enemies/traps/encounters/move sets (Lustmore Academy, Exotic Gardens, Bunny Casino, Crimson Cathedral), free exploration, RPG mechanics, more stuff I'm too lazy to write.

The reference was AI generated by me using Flux and a billion other img2img models.
I have a Discord for chatting and updates. Feel free to join!

No User Persona needed but it can help to add something along the following:

{{user}} is a handsome X'X" man. {{user}} is XX years old with a lithe build. {{user}} is masculine with short brown hair and dark brown eyes.

This bot is designed for MalePOV or FemalePOV or AnyPOV.

Tags: Exploration, Battle Fuck RPG, Femdom, Powerplay, Power Exchange, Bondage, Pheromones, Seduction, Domination, Enslavement, Multiple Girls, Zako, Monster Girls, Succubus, Smothering, Teasing, Tease, Denial, Edging, Orgasm Control, Cum Milking, Submission, CNC, Rape, Erotic Humiliation, BDSM, Bondage, Breathplay, Facesitting, Arousal, Forced Orgasm, Traps, Sexual Perils, Perfume Aphrodisiac Arousal Inducing Pheromones, CFNM, ENF, Restraint, Combat, Sex Fight, Face-sitting, Smothering, Pleasure Domination, Corruption, Transformation, Mesmerized, Mesmerizing, Charmed, Mind Control, Hypnosis, Enslavement, CNC, Non-Con, Non-Consent, Multiple Endings, Bad End, Sexy Enemies, Outercourse, Clothing, Costumes, Outfit Play, Soft Vore, Escape Scenario, Energy Drain, 18+

Dev Notes: Sorry again for the gap in bots. I've been spending a lot more time developing AI systems than creating bots themselves. But Janitor did improve their Lorebook system and I felt extra motivated to create something. Since Delululemon, I released my mobile app on the Apple App Store and I'm also working on a Desktop Application that is essentially ChatGPT + SillyTavern with full user customization (down to system prompts and even runs Javascript/Three.js generated code natively) wrapped all together into a simple package. This is a big project, but its going extremely well. I'm also working on creating my own LLMs that are small... and quite a bit different than what others are doing. But I can't share details about them at this time. Anyways...

Thanks for playing guys! Leave some feedback if you enjoyed this!
creator: PlayerWon
